title: Cultures converge as Andhra University marks its centenary
description: The celebrations have become a platform for international students to showcase their cultures, traditions, languages, and cuisines. The festivities highlight the university’s long-standing international relations, reaffirming its role as a hub where local heritage meets global exchange. In the lead-up to its Foundation Day on April 26, 2026, the university has been organising a series of programmes to celebrate its academic and cultural heritage.
